textByHashes.4e3700c062f40794152f0b9a0e59801f9a4c6286: Hello there. Have you come to reflect?
textByHashes.f01fad59c69dbbc856533c330857f5ad0ee22c8f: It's not for everyone. You are always welcome to pray to Seren here if you wish though. If you prefer, I can offer you the ability to respawn in Prifddinas upon death.
textByHashes.5650d02229a93bdfec9646bf3196dd82d1ede7fa: Then it shall be so. From now on, you will respawn in Prifddinas.
textByHashes.8d075a7245b71cd6448933baf4723f5a1011f8cd: As you wish. I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHashes.112c3d634434acf2b83217d2e74a68e81b940aeb: It's not for everyone. You are always welcome to pray to Seren here if you wish though. If you prefer, I can revert your respawn point to Lumbridge.
textByHashes.d935c8dd28af3b62fc9e29dfb242532f38e1c174: Then it shall be so. From now on, you will respawn in Lumbridge.
textByHashes.4d7b890fc7f55fc5ca5ccc8f91d3b2d94b8a72c6: As you wish. If you ever tire of respawning in Prifddinas, just let me know.
